title: I GUAL ZAWHDAN HIH BANG HI

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka kahna lamna tawh nong heisak hi
Ka dahna nopna'n nong hei sak hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: HIh mual kuam teng thawn hi

sections.label: Bridge
lines: I gual zawhdan hih bang hi
I gual zawhdan hih bang hi
I gual zawhdan hih bang hi
I gual zawhdan hih bang hi
